title: Government Core QKD Network in Riyadh
entry_mechanism: NCA-led programme deploying QKD network connecting Saudi government headquarters in Riyadh
executive_summary:
Quantum Key Distribution (QKD) networks use quantum physics — specifically the quantum property that measuring a quantum state disturbs it — to distribute encryption keys that are physically impossible to intercept without detection. For Saudi Arabia's most sensitive government communications — royal court, intelligence services, military command, and financial system settlement — QKD offers an encryption paradigm that is secure against both current and future (quantum computer) attacks.

Node QT-3 targets Saudi Arabia's first operational QKD network: a dark fibre QKD backbone connecting the 20 most sensitive Saudi government facilities in Riyadh — Ministry of Interior, Ministry of Defence, SAMA, NCA headquarters, royal palaces, and military command centres. The network uses commercially available QKD systems (ID Quantique or Toshiba) and provides quantum-secure key material for encrypting government communications.

China has deployed 4,600 km of QKD network infrastructure; South Korea, Japan, and EU nations are deploying national QKD networks. Saudi Arabia's QT-3 programme establishes the Kingdom as the first Arab country with operational government QKD, a significant quantum sovereignty milestone.

companies.name: ID Quantique
companies.rationale: ID Quantique is the global QKD market leader with deployed government networks in South Korea, Switzerland, and Austria. Swiss technology is non-ITAR and ID Quantique has the most mature commercial QKD product line.

companies.name: Toshiba Quantum Technology
companies.rationale: Toshiba has the world's highest-performance QKD technology and has deployed networks for UK government and financial sector.

companies.name: ADVA Optical Networking
companies.rationale: ADVA integrates QKD into optical networks and has government QKD network deployments in Europe.

companies.name: Rohde & Schwarz
companies.rationale: R&S integrates QKD key material with government encrypted communications systems.

companies.name: QuantumCTek
companies.rationale: QuantumCTek operates the world's largest QKD network. Chinese technology with policy considerations.

partners.name: NCA (National Cybersecurity Authority)
partners.current: Government communications security; some quantum awareness programme
partners.upgrade: NCA leads Saudi QKD network programme; dark fibre procurement in Riyadh government district; ID Quantique deployment; 20 Saudi QKD operators trained; Phase I: Riyadh core; Phase II: Jeddah and Dammam
partners.timeline: 30 months to operational Riyadh QKD network

partners.name: STC (Saudi Telecom)
partners.current: National fibre backbone; government connectivity provider
partners.upgrade: STC dark fibre for QKD network; STC as QKD network operator under NCA oversight; STC quantum-secure connectivity service for government

partners.name: KACST Quantum Research
partners.current: Quantum physics research; some quantum optics
partners.upgrade: KACST QKD protocol research; quantum channel characterisation for Saudi fibre infrastructure; Saudi quantum network management software research

partners.name: Saudi MOD / Military Communications
partners.current: Classified military communications; some crypto infrastructure
partners.upgrade: Military QKD extension from Riyadh government network; quantum-secure military command communications; MOD as Phase I QKD deployment site
